title: 9_Sander_Varieties_Dispute_Processing_1976
description: Frank E.A. Sander — Varieties of Dispute Processing (70 F.R.D. 111 (1976))
show_notes:
Frank E.A. Sander — Varieties of Dispute Processing (70 F.R.D. 111 (1976))

Frank Sander's 1976 Pound Conference address launched the modern alternative-dispute-resolution movement and the idea of the multi-door courthouse. Surveying the varieties of dispute processing — mediation, arbitration, fact-finding, ombudsmen, and more — he proposes matching each kind of dispute to the forum best suited to resolve it, rather than defaulting every conflict to adjudication.

Chapters:
44:24 Conclusion
